title: Bead Execution Telemetry
description: Top-level feature container for telemetry capture, storage, and scheduler integration across both runner backends.
acceptance_criteria: All child beads completed and merged
Every bead execution attempt stores lightweight metrics in bead.metadata.telemetry and telemetry_history
Every attempt writes a full artifact file to .orchestrator/telemetry/<bead_id>/
Claude Code runs capture all provider fields; Codex runs capture wall-clock duration and prompt size
Failed attempts still produce telemetry with null response and populated error
telemetry_history capped at N entries (default 10, configurable via ORCHESTRATOR_TELEMETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS)
